MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Set For Trial On May-22-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents (Part 2 Of 2 For Purposes Of Entry Of Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents.
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BRYANA MCGUIRK, Esq. of Edlin Gallagher Huie + Blum (Tel: 415-397-9006) for defendant Alejandro Escalera Rodriguez;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ALEJANDRO RODRIGUEZ's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents

Defendant Rodriguez stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant Rodriguez (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant ALEJANDRO RODRIGUEZ ("RODRIGUEZ") moves to compel Plaintiff PEARLENE THOMAS ("THOMAS") to provide further responses to his Request for Production, Set One, more specifically request numbers 1-12, 13-16, 17-21, 22-25, 27-31, 33-35, 37, 40, 44-49, 51, and 53-54. RODRIGUEZ also seeks sanctions. THOMAS opposes only the sanctions portion of the motion. On May 18, 2022, Thomas served verified amended responses to the production requests placed at issue, without objections. The court makes no finding as to the adequacy of these amended responses.

The court rules as follows:

1. THOMAS has served verified written amended responses to the production requests rendering that portion of the motion moot.

2. THOMAS is ordered to produce the documents responsive to the production requests no later than ten (10) days after notice of entry of this Order.

3. Sanctions are granted against THOMAS and her counsel of record, jointly and severely, at one-half of the $2,597 requested. Sanctions of $1,298.50 to be paid to RODRIGUEZ's counsel no later than twenty (20) days after notice of entry of this Order.

Counsel for defendant Rodriguez to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge in Word format at sspaulding@bcsslaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Spaulding; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Pearlene Thomas To Provide Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BRYANA MCGUIRK, Esq. of Edlin Gallagher Huie + Blum (Tel: 415-397-9006) for defendant Alejandro Escalera Rodriguez;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ALEJANDRO RODRIGUEZ's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Pearlene Thomas To Provide Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant Rodriguez stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant Rodriguez (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant ALEJANDRO RODRIGUEZ ("RODRIGUEZ") moves to compel Plaintiff PEARLENE THOMAS ("THOMAS") to provide further responses to his Special Interrogatories, Set One, more specifically interrogatory numbers 2, 9-10, 12, 15-16, 18, 20 and 21. RODRIGUEZ also seeks sanctions. THOMAS opposes only the sanctions portion of the motion. On May 18, 2022, Thomas served verified amended responses to the special interrogatories placed at issue, without objections. The court makes no finding as to the adequacy of these responses.

The court makes the following orders:

1. THOMAS has served verified written amended responses to the special interrogatories rendering that portion of the motion moot.

2. Sanctions are granted against THOMAS and her counsel of record, jointly and severely, at one-half of the $2,597 requested. Sanctions of $1,298.50 to be paid to RODRIGUEZ's counsel no later than twenty (20) days after notice of entry of this Order.

Counsel for defendant Rodriguez to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge in Word format at sspaulding@bcsslaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Spaulding; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
